mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, user_name, content, is_private, confirm, create_date FROM counseling_comment WHERE id = #{id} ORDER BY create_date ASC
SELECT id, user_id, user_name, content, is_private, confirm, create_date FROM counseling_comment WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM counseling_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO counseling_comment (user_id, user_name, content, post_id, confirm, create_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{content}, #{postId}, #{confirm}, NOW())
